SMITH TO CHECK ON HIS APPEARANCE. WHEN THE CASE WAS RECALLED, MR. WHITE INFORMED THE COURT THAT MR. SMITH'S CRIMINAL MATTER IS IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND WILL NOT BE APPEARING.
